case_number: Criminal Jail Appeal No. S-109 of 2021

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Criminal Jail Appeal No. S-109 of 2021 (Maqbool Soomro & another vs. The State) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of MA No. 1428/2024 (426 Cr.P.C) 2. For hearing of main case. 26-03-2024. Ms. Rizwana Jabeen Siddiqui, advocate for the appellants. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional P.G for the State. -.-.-.-.-.-.- It is stated by learned counsel for the appellants that the appellants have already served out the substantial sentence and they are confined in jail for want of payment of Arsh money, which they could not pay being in jail; therefore, they be released on bail by suspending the operation of impugned sentence, which is not opposed by learned Additional P.G for the State. In view of above, while relying upon the case of Abdul Hameed Vs. Muhammad Abdullah and others (1999 SCMR-2589), the operation of impugned sentence is suspended and the appellants are directed to be released on bail, subject to their furnishing surety in sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty thousand) each and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. Instant listed application is disposed of accordingly. Adjourned to be fixed after four weeks for hearing of main appeal. J U D G E Nasim/P.A
